### Scores
- Design Elegance: 2 — Architecture is unnecessarily complex for the stated requirements
- Innovation: 2 — No novel approach; existing solutions are more mature
- Feasibility: 1 — Timeline is unrealistic given team size and skill gaps
- Adaptability: 3 — Modular design allows future changes but foundation is weak

### Overall Analysis
The proposal attempts to solve a well-understood problem with an over-engineered solution. The timeline is the most critical flaw — it assumes zero ramp-up cost for unfamiliar technologies. Existing off-the-shelf solutions would deliver 80% of the value at 20% of the cost. The modular architecture is the only redeeming aspect.

### Verdict
Reject

### Risks and Concerns
- Unrealistic timeline for team's current skill level
- Over-engineering for stated requirements
- Mature alternatives already exist in the ecosystem
